title: vpiPackage returned when iterating over vpiModules
body:
For reference:
https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/2887

If you run `t_vpi_module.pl --iv` on HEAD of Verilator you'll get this:
```
%Error: t_vpi_module.cpp:95: GOT = 600   EXP = 32
%Error: t_vpi_module.cpp:95: C Test failed
```
which tells us that even though we asked to vpi_iterate() over vpiModules (32) we got back a vpiPackage (600).  I believe this is wrong because 38.23 says:
> The vpi_iterate() routine shall return a handle to an iterator, whose type shall be
vpiIterator, which can used by vpi_scan() to traverse all objects of type type associated with object ref.

Which to me reads like it can **only** return objects of type `type`.  Thoughts?  Am I reading this correctly?

I'm currently running iverilog 10.1.
code_blocks:
%Error: t_vpi_module.cpp:95: GOT = 600   EXP = 32
%Error: t_vpi_module.cpp:95: C Test failed
